title: campsis grandiflora
intro: Campsis grandiflora, also known as the Trumpet Vine or Campsis, is a flowering plant native to China and Korea, belonging to the Bignoniaceae family. The plant's flowers and leaves have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Campsis grandiflora include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antispasmodic agent. Campsis grandiflora can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies.
